"[45] RENO PD CB ADVSD VEH ISNT TECHNICALLY STOLEN DUE TO THE RO HAVING THE PAY OUT AND TECHNICALLY THE INSURANCE COMPANY IS THE OWNER SO IT WAS REMOVED FROM SYSTEM DUE TO THE INSURANCE NOT REQ IT BE ENTERED "

"[44] 10-39 RENO PD ADVSD VEH WAS REPORTED STOLEN BY THE GENERAL MANAGER OF COPART WHERE THE VEH WAS BEING STORED TILL RO GOT PAID OUT// RO GOT PAID OUT SO RENO PD TOOK STOLEN VEH OO SYSTEM DUE TO THERE NOT BEING AN OWNER ANYMORE // RENO PD GOING TO INQ FURTHER COPIES VEH WAS LOCATED AND TRYING TO INQ IF THEY NEED A LOCATE AND CB"
